overview: Aditya College of Pharmacy (ACOP) was established in 2006 by the Aditya Academy in Surampalem, East Godavari District (now Kakinada District), Andhra Pradesh. Situated within the sprawling Aditya University campus township, the institution provides professional pharmaceutical education aimed at preparing students for careers in clinical research, drug manufacturing, healthcare management, and pharmacological sciences.
accreditation: Approved by the Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), New Delhi, and the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). It is affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK) and accredited with an 'A' grade by NAAC (CGPA of 3.24).

nirfRanking.university: Part of the extensive Aditya group network, currently transitioning operational elements under the consolidated Aditya University framework.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹31,000 – ₹40,000 per year (Category A Convener Quota via AP EAPCET; total course structure ranges approx. ₹1,24,000 - ₹1,60,000)
₹35,000 – ₹57,000 per year (Category A Convener Quota; cumulative multi-year baseline averages approx. ₹2,10,000 - ₹3,42,000)
₹55,000 – ₹75,000 per year (Total 2-year program cost ranges approx. ₹1,10,000 - ₹1,50,000)

placements.highestSalary: ₹4.50 LPA – ₹5.00 LPA (Consistent top-tier domain placements in manufacturing and medical networks)
placements.highestDomestic: ₹4.50 LPA verified institutional framework operational bounds
placements.placementRate: 60% – 70% during standard annual healthcare and retail pharmaceutical hiring seasons
placements.totalOffers: 160+ campus-wide student selections achieved during centralized placement drives
placements.companiesVisited: 20+ core healthcare and global multi-national life science organizations
placements.internationalOffers: Data not systematically isolated from central analytical pipelines

examsAccepted: AP EAPCET (B.Pharm / Pharm.D - Bi.P.C & M.P.C Streams)
admissions.admissionProcess: Category A standard seats (70%) are securely filled through centralized state web counseling managed by APSCHE depending on entrance merit ranks. Category B management seats (30%) are completed directly through the college based on foundational academic qualification criteria.
admissions.importantDates: State-administered pharmacy counseling phases systematically roll out between July and October every year.

campus.area: Eco-friendly dedicated medical block within the extensive Surampalem campus township
facilities: Central Library with specialized medical e-journals
Medicinal Plant Garden for practical botanical training
Computer Centers with domain analytical software
In-campus Secure Separate Hostels for Boys
In-campus Secure Separate Hostels for Girls
Institution Transit Buses running across East/West Godavari districts
Differently-abled Friendly Resources (Ramp and Toilet access systems)
campus.specialNote: The institute emphasizes clinical field training, regularly orchestrating multi-day hospital visits and organizing national level computational advancement conferences like CARE.

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: ₹45,000 – ₹65,000 per year based on room configuration and dining plans
hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Factored alongside institutional residential dining facility profiles
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) complete state tuition-fee reimbursement for qualifying candidates
Post-Matric welfare allowances from the Government of Andhra Pradesh
Institutional fee concessions for top-ranking entrance exam achievers
